title: PredictStructure confidence.json
description: Standardized confidence metrics from structure prediction.

ptm.description: Predicted TM-score (0-1 scale), or null if unavailable.

per_atom_plddt.description: Optional per-atom pLDDT (0-100), ordered to match ATOM records in model_1.pdb. For AF3-style tools (Boltz, Chai, OpenFold) this contains true per-atom values; for AF2/ESMFold the per-residue value is replicated across each residue's atoms. Length >= per_residue_plddt length.
